description_long: This humanoid robot features a robust, metallic body with a rounded, dome-shaped torso and two large cylindrical tanks mounted on its back. Its arms are heavily jointed and mechanical, with one arm raised and ending in a pincer-like claw, while the other arm is bent and also terminates in a claw. The legs are thick and mechanical, with visible joints and wide, stable feet designed for support and movement. The surface is predominantly a dark, bronzed metal with visible bolts, seams, and industrial detailing, giving it a steampunk aesthetic. The front of the torso has a circular panel with intricate mechanical features, and the head is integrated into the torso with a single, small lens or sensor on the front. The overall design suggests durability and functionality, suitable for urban environments requiring strength and resilience.
description: A steampunk-inspired humanoid robot with a domed torso, large back-mounted tanks, articulated arms ending in claws, and sturdy mechanical legs. Its bronzed metallic surface and industrial details convey strength and durability.
description_view_0: Front view showing the domed torso, circular chest panel, raised right arm with claw, and both legs clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cylindrical back tank, the profile of the domed torso, and the extended right arm.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying both large cylindrical tanks, the back of the arms, and the mechanical structure of the legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the left tank, the bent left arm, and the mechanical details of the leg and arm joints.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with torso facing forward, right arm raised and bent at the elbow, left arm bent downward, both legs straight and feet planted firmly.
attribute_clothing_style: No clothing; exterior consists of integrated metallic panels and industrial components with a steampunk aesthetic.
attribute_facial_features: No traditional face; a single small lens or sensor is present on the front of the dome-shaped torso, with no visible eyes, mouth, or nose.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms have multiple hinge and rotary joints at the shoulder, elbow, and wrist, ending in articulated claws; legs have hinge joints at the hip, knee, and ankle, with wide, stable feet.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: Single lens or camera sensor on the front of the torso; no other visible sensors.
